name: Italian-Style Pot Roast - Venison
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, brown the roast on all sides in fat.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (except flour) and pour over the pot roast.
4. Cover and bake for 3 to 4 hours at 300°F.
5. Pour off the liquid and measure it.
6. Mix a smooth paste of flour and water, using 2 tablespoons of water and 1 tablespoon of flour per cup of liquid.
7. Gradually add the hot liquid, stirring constantly, until thickened.
8. Correct seasoning as needed.
